oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Conference 2023 Information
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Aviculture, American Federation of
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 50 Number 2 (April 2023).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.Conference Information Location: Hilton Hotel Richardson Dallas 701 E. Campbell Rd. Richardson, TX 75081 Be sure to book your room through the AFA discounted conference portal to get the conference room rate of $129 night plus tax which includes free wifi and free parking. https://www.hilton.com/en/attend-my-event/afa49thannualconference/ The special room rate is available from September 21, 2023, through October 3, 2023 Room highlights include: mini refrigerator, Keurig, hair dryer, iron/ironing board The hotel also offers a restaurant serving breakfast and dinner, 24-hour exercise facility and an outdoor swimming pool. There are also a lot of great sightseeing opportunities in Dallas. The conference opens Thursday morning and closes with the banquet on Saturday evening. The rate is $295 which includes the conference, the banquet and the offsite trip (to be announced). There is also a...Dallas Area Rapid Transit (DART) operates buses, light rail, and commuter rail. DART rail line is available from DFW airport to the hotel – the cost is less than $5.00. From the airport, take the orange line to the West End Station and transfer to the red line to Galatyn Park Station – takes about 2 hours. The hotel is about .8 mile walking distance from the station. There are various shuttle services available from both airports for around $40 each way.Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 50 No. 2 (2023): Watchbird April 2023; 27
